sources.title: Building Effective Agents - Anthropic Engineering
sources.takeaway: Start simple, prefer raw APIs over frameworks, invest in tool design (ACI), build for human oversight, customer support is the proven production use case

sources.title: AI Agents in Production - Huyen Chip
sources.takeaway: Planning failures are the #1 issue, decouple planning from execution, validate before running, tool quality > model quality, start with 3-5 tools

sources.title: State of AI Agents 2024 - Latent Space
sources.takeaway: Coding agents have strongest PMF, auth/permissions is a major gap, human-in-the-loop design is unsolved, Claude dominates agentic tasks

sources.title: LLM Evaluation in Practice - Hamel Husain
sources.takeaway: Three-level eval hierarchy (unit tests > human/model eval > A/B), domain-specific beats generic, start simple with spreadsheets, never stop looking at data

sources.title: LangGraph Cloud - LangChain
sources.takeaway: Production features: Postgres checkpointer, double-texting handling, cron jobs, breakpoints for debugging. Used by Klarna, Rippling, Lyft, Harvey, Elastic

sources.title: LangGraph - Agent Runtime and Orchestration
sources.takeaway: Positions as 'agent runtime and low-level orchestration framework' balancing control with agency. MIT licensed. Human-in-the-loop, memory, streaming as key features

sources.title: CrewAI Crews - Multi-Agent Orchestration
sources.takeaway: Sequential/hierarchical processes, short/long/entity memory, caching, rate limiting, replay from checkpoints. Framework not infrastructure

sources.title: AutoGen - Microsoft Research
sources.takeaway: Multi-agent conversation framework. Used by Novo Nordisk. Open question: optimal workflow config. Challenges: progress detection, debugging, scaling

sources.title: Why Langfuse - Open Source LLM Observability
sources.takeaway: MIT licensed, self-hostable, no feature gating. Hierarchical traces, cost tracking, prompt versioning, A/B testing. Proves the self-hosted observability market

sources.title: Letta (MemGPT) - Stateful AI Agents
sources.takeaway: Memory-first platform: Letta Code (terminal), SDK (apps), API (memory management). Narrow focus on stateful memory without runtime/eval/operator infrastructure

sources.title: Awesome AI Agents - Landscape Overview
sources.takeaway: Convergence on memory systems, tool integration via function-calling, human-agent loops. Movement toward pluggable model backends and SOP-based task decomposition

sources.title: Cairn-rs RFCs 001-014
sources.takeaway: Competitive positioning validated: coherence over breadth, self-hosted-first, integration is the product. 14 RFCs define the full product boundary

quality.notes: Strong coverage of architectural patterns and competitor positioning. Weaker on first-person production failure stories (Reddit/HN blocked). Anthropic and Huyen Chip pieces are gold-standard references.
